text:
押忍！
先生、今回もよろしくお願いします！

今回は、カルターゴの弱点についての
調査となります！

背後にまわり込んで、弱点をうつ！
その効果を確かめる、というものです！

先生の動きを参考にしつつ
自身で実践できるように……
自分、

Heck yeah! I'm looking forward to working with
you again, teach!

Our task today is to find the Carthago's weak
point!

So we want to confirm that the right
approach is to get around its back, then
go for the squishy part!

My personal goal is to learn from
watching you while working toward
being able to do it myself!
